Refillable glass jars on a shelf in a zero-waste bulk shop; on-theme zero-waste image but doesn't depict the specific kitchen-consumable swaps (beeswax wraps, reusable cloths, etc.) the tutorial covers.
Clear yellow vegetable noodle soup with carrots being ladled out of a decorative pot; not the red/orange tomato-and-rice Polish soup zupa pomidorowa.
Bowl of seafood soup with mussels, fish, and shrimp at the side; right seafood mix and dish type but the broth looks creamy rather than the tomato-and-white-wine base that defines zuppa di pesce.
Sliced rye/wholemeal loaf on a wooden board; the tutorial is a sour rye soup (Żurek), not a loaf of bread.
